title: aciotis annua
intro: Aciotis annua, also known as the annual Aciotis, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, valued for its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Aciotis annua can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
